prestazioni: Litchfield Motorsport M838TQ (P1-specific) hybrid turbo upgrade with Garrett GTX5533R billet compressor wheels, 106mm inducer, and 3D-printed Inconel 718 turbine housing for 1,000+ hp on E85, paired with a custom Litchfield titanium wastegate dump tube and 4-ply silicone charge pipes reinforced with carbon fiber sleeves

Lap3 Motorsport M838TQ dry-sump conversion with a 12-liter ATL fuel cell, billet aluminum oil pan, and dual Scavenger Systems external oil pumps to eliminate oil starvation during 2.5G lateral loads, integrated with a Setrab 50-row oil cooler and a PWR water-to-oil heat exchanger

McLaren Special Operations (MSO) HDK-spec ECU recalibration with Motec M150 standalone integration, featuring a custom anti-lag system (ALS) with sequential port injection and direct injection mapping for 30ms throttle response, paired with a Pectel SQ6M data logger and a Bosch Motorsport 60-2 crank trigger wheel for sub-1° timing accuracy
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS P1 HDK widebody kit with 3D-scanned carbon fiber fenders (25mm wider front, 40mm wider rear), reinforced with titanium subframe spacers and custom aluminum wheel arches to accommodate 20x12.5 ET45 (front) and 21x14.5 ET55 (rear) BBS FI-R wheels

Vorsteiner P1 GTR-style carbon fiber front splitter with active Gurney flaps (electrically adjustable via MSO HDK ECU), paired with a custom Novitec rear diffuser featuring integrated LED brake cooling ducts and a titanium exhaust shroud for the twin Akrapović Evolution Line titanium exhaust system

MSO HDK-specific interior with carbon fiber Recaro Pole Position seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified), Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a custom Alcantara-wrapped steering wheel featuring a Motec C127 dash display with integrated G-force meter and lap timer, paired with a titanium roll cage designed by Sabelt and coated in PVD gold
